data.body: CAPSTONE RE-RUN on the CURRENT epic (the dogfooding we'd lapsed) — highly productive. PROCESS PROBLEM found+FIXED: Pass-1 emitted 44 findings; the SINGLE aggregate Pass-2 returned 0 -> all 44 silently dropped at conf 0 (gate would report nothing despite real findings). Fix: pass2_verify_all now BATCHES (12/call, global indices, merge) + pass3 marks missing-verify as INDETERMINATE (surfaced, never silently dropped); final_gate feeds child BODY excerpts (not titles) for G3/G4. Committed 50491d0a. SYNC ERRORS the gate caught + FIXED: (ISF run) ISF missing from the epic's authoritative registry + G3/G4 mislabeled AGENT in prose; (Pass-1) version drift v5/v6/v8 as 'canonical'; round-3 self-review note 'not yet decomposed' stale; G4 ownership conflict (012e re-owning the 8f6c tooling) -> 012e now CONSUMES 8f6c. REAL DESIGN FEEDBACK to carry to brainstorm/children (valid, not yet actioned): T9/T5b REVIEW_RESULT sidecar has no RETIRE/cleanup + re-run write idempotency; T8 Pass-2 severity-attribute enum vocab not in the epic spec; T12 kill-switch DEFAULT state + rollback not in ACs + sidecar deploy-ordering; T5c secret/data leakage into logged findings + eval corpus + access level of rebar review-plan surface; E6 no E2E proving check (claim-block->review->signature->claim); G6 fitness (v1 fail-open DET + advisory-only Layer-2 = minimal blocking by design); T2/T5a latency targets asserted w/o a benchmark step + out-of-band review uncapped latency. Created F7 epic bd83-c56f-1f72-4ef2 (cross-ticket overlap, store-wide cross-epic+non-epic, OUTSIDE the gate) per Joe. The re-run VALIDATES the gate: it caught real defects the moment it was run on the current artifact with adequate budget.
